topic: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How)
challengeTask: Use at least 10 sentences with WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How) in a real conversation or diary entry today.
hindiTask: आज WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How) का उपयोग करते हुए कम से कम 10 वाक्य किसी असली बातचीत या डायरी में लिखें।
successCriteria: WH Words (What, When, Where, Who, Why, Whom, Whose, Which, How) rule applied correctly in every sentence
bonusChallenge: Record yourself speaking 5 of these sentences and check your pronunciation.
